name: Dumbbell Close-Grip Press
shortDescription: A pressing movement with dumbbells held close together to emphasize triceps activation.
instructions: Lie on a bench holding dumbbells together above your chest, palms facing each other. Lower the weights while keeping elbows close to your sides, then press back up by extending the arms.
steps: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand.
Hold dumbbells together above chest, palms in.
Lower dumbbells toward sternum, elbows tight to torso.
Press dumbbells back up by extending arms.
breathing: Inhale as you lower the dumbbells, exhale as you press up.
